tasks.label: Build and Run Pong
tasks.command: nasm -f elf32 multiboot.asm -o multiboot.o && g++ -m32 -c main.cpp -o main.o -ffreestanding -O2 -fno-exceptions -fno-rtti -w && ld -m elf_i386 -T linker.ld multiboot.o main.o -o kernel.bin && grub-mkrescue -o pong.iso iso_root && qemu-system-i386 -cdrom pong.iso
